nasb.text: You will fall by the sword. I will judge you to the border of Israel; so you shall know that I am the Lord.

esv.text: You shall fall by the sword. I will judge you at the border of Israel, and you shall know that I am the Lord.

cnv.text: 你們必倒在刀下，我必審判你們，直到以色列的邊境；你們就知道我是耶和華。

ccb.text: 使你们死于刀下。我要审判整个以色列，这样你们就知道我是耶和华。
